data.location: 15th Street Porch - High Line, New York, NY
data.short_description: Al Volo, a concept from the Realmuto Group, is preparing to open a kiosk location with seating at the 15th Street Porch on the High Line. The High Line location will offer a condensed menu focused on focaccia and is seeking a beer and wine license. It follows an existing location at Pier 57 that opened in April.

data.location: Multiple cities in Quebec (Laval, Québec City, Sherbrooke, Trois-Rivières, Chicoutimi, Rimouski)
data.short_description: The Abbatiello Group, a Quebec-based restaurant operator, has acquired the 21-unit Shaker Cuisine & Mixologie chain. The acquisition marks a continuation of the group's multi-brand franchising expansion strategy across Canada. Shaker Cuisine & Mixologie is known for its cocktail-driven bar atmosphere and menu featuring tartares, burgers, and poutines.

Blazin' Hot Chicken is expanding with a new location planned for Broussard, LA in a former Wendy's connected to a gas station. An opening date has not been announced. The chain currently operates five locations across Louisiana.

data.location: 1024 Queen St W, Toronto, ON M6J 1H6, Canada
data.short_description: Kafe, an LA-based "brew and collab" coffee shop concept, is opening its Toronto location at 1024 Queen St. W in partnership with Frano Pizza & Panini. The Toronto cafe is expected to open around mid-June 2026 and will feature specialty coffee, pizza, panini, pastries, and wine.

data.status: expected to open its seventh location on May 20
data.short_description: Newark-based fried chicken chain Ox-B's is opening its seventh Central Ohio location in downtown Marion. Opening day celebrations will include free food from 11 a.m. to 2 p.m., giveaways, and a fundraising effort for the nonprofit Marion Matters.

data.location: 570 E Oakton St, Des Plaines, IL 60018
data.short_description: Meso Cafe is a new coffee concept coming to 570 E Oakton Street in Des Plaines, in a former Crack N Crabz space. Signage has been put up and the team is preparing the space, though an opening date has not been revealed. Coffee, teas, and dessert options are expected.

Meimei's is a planned bistro for the Lower East Side featuring French and Chinese culinary influences at 143 Orchard St., in the former Gugu Room space. The menu will include dishes like sunflower mousse, mussel escabeche with Shaoxing-style foie gras, and panna cotta, with seating for 38 and an 8-seat bar. An opening date has not been announced.

data.location: Six locations across Ontario: Newmarket, Toronto, Kingston, Whitby, Barrie, and Peterborough
data.short_description: Happy Belly Food Group is acquiring an initial 50% stake in Ontario-based Ghost Taco through a binding Letter of Intent signed May 4. Ghost Taco currently operates six locations across Ontario and will become Happy Belly's 11th restaurant brand.

data.location: 491 Appleby Line, Burlington, ON L7L 2Y1, Canada
data.status: expected to open in early June
data.short_description: The Burnt Tongue, a Hamilton-based soup and comfort food restaurant, is opening its fifth location and first outside of Hamilton in Burlington at 491 Appleby Line. The team is aiming for a June 1 opening date pending construction progress.

Healthy restaurant chain FARE is opening a new location at 868 N Wells Street in Chicago's Old Town neighborhood. An official opening date has not been released, but it is expected sometime this summer.

data.status: expected to open later this year
data.short_description: The historic Houston Inn, which first opened in 1954 and closed during the COVID-19 pandemic, is undergoing a major renovation under new leadership to reopen as an elevated steakhouse concept. The refreshed concept will feature steakhouse-inspired offerings including filet mignon, seafood, and a curated cocktail program.

Namaste Bazaar, a family-owned Indian grocery concept, is preparing to debut at the Village Mall at 436 Broadway in Methuen. The store will stock Indian staples including spices, lentils, rice, frozen foods, and snacks. An opening timeline has not yet been set.

Namaste Café, a family-owned Indian street food café, is also preparing to debut at the Village Mall at 436 Broadway in Methuen alongside the Namaste Bazaar. The menu will feature pani puri, chaat, and handcrafted beverages such as sugarcane juice, chai, and lassi. An opening timeline has not yet been set.

Dram Projects 3, LLC has filed permit applications with the Florida DBPR to open a Bro's Hot Chicken at 10899 SW Fourth Street in Sweetwater. An exact opening date has not been announced. The Miami-born fast-casual chain offers Nashville hot chicken in multiple heat levels as tenders, sandwiches, wraps, and bowls.

Trinity Blue Hospitality Group LLC has filed permit applications with the Florida DBPR to open an APizza Brooklyn Resto & Vino at 10825 NW 40th Street #580 in Doral. An opening date has not been announced. The restaurant offers Italian-American dishes including garlic rolls, baked ziti, chicken parm, and linguini carbonara.

data.location: 6920 N Rochester Rd, Rochester Hills, MI 48306
data.short_description: Dime Store's Rochester Hills location will permanently close on May 10 due to financial struggles, as announced by the restaurant. The original Detroit location will continue to operate. The Rochester Hills location had opened in 2024 inside Papa Joe's Plaza.

data.location: 3393 Peachtree Rd NE (Lenox Square), Atlanta, GA 30326
data.status: bringing a new location to Buckhead this October
data.short_description: VIỆTVANA Phở Noodle House is opening a new flagship location at Lenox Square in Buckhead, marking the brand's fourth location. The open-kitchen concept will be modeled after narrow street-side dining found in Vietnam and will serve phở, banh mi, vermicelli, broken rice, coffee, and desserts.

data.location: 3616 Spring Mountain Rd #101, Las Vegas, NV 89102
data.short_description: Le Cafe Central permanently closed its Chinatown Las Vegas location, with the closure announced on social media on May 6. The other two locations in Southern Highlands and Horizon Ridge will continue operating, and a new concept is planned for the closed space by fall.

A family-owned coffee shop and fitness concept called Perk N Press is under construction at 217 W Main Street in Potterville. The team does not have an opening date yet, and no menu has been released, though coffees and exercise-related drinks are expected.

Personal chef Landi Prendi is opening Valentina Italian Ristorante this spring at 2501 Meredith St in Philadelphia's Fairmount neighborhood, in the former Figs space. The menu will feature handmade pasta dishes, small plates, and desserts, and the restaurant will be BYOB.

data.status: hopes to open sometime in the coming weeks, pending final approvals
data.short_description: Revival Cafe + Kitchen is preparing to open its seventh location at 60 Western Ave in the lobby of the One Milestone complex within Harvard's Enterprise Research Campus in Allston. The primarily takeout-focused café will offer Revival's full coffee and beverage program, house-made pastries, and grab-and-go savory items.

data.status: will serve its last drink on May 17, 2026 / will be closing its doors the evening of Sunday, May 17th, 2026
data.short_description: After eight years, Fire Ant Brewing Company prepares to shut its doors. The owners announced retirement plans on social media. The brewpub served German-style beers and pub food.

data.status: will close permanently this month / will close on May 29, 2026
data.short_description: Beloved New Orleans diner Leni’s Cafe will close after nearly 50 years. Owners Mr. Pete and Mrs. Debbie are retiring. The family-style restaurant served breakfast and lunch staples.

data.location: 181 E Santa Clara St, San Jose, CA 95113
data.short_description: M.O. Hospitality Group is introducing chef-driven restaurant Strāta in Downtown San Jose. The seasonally rotating menu focuses on layers of flavors and California ingredients. The design features warm earthy tones and layered textures.

All-day café-bakery Coffee T Bagels is planned for Hell’s Kitchen. It will serve fresh-baked bagels, croissants, sandwiches, Turkish desserts, beer, and wine. Nearly everything on the menu will be prepared on-site daily.

data.location: 8720 W Sunset Rd, Las Vegas, NV 89148, Suite D150
data.status: is planned to open ... this June
data.short_description: Metro Pizza will open a fifth location at The Bend shopping center. The landmark pizzeria is known for slow-fermented dough and authentic pizza. It joins other dining options at the new center.

Jeff’s Bagel Run is expanding with a new Houston Heights location. The Florida-based brand will undergo quick renovations in the 1,300 sq ft space. Franchisee Brian Hess is leading the Greater Houston expansion.

data.status: could open as early as June
data.short_description: Family-owned Somali-inspired cafe Shaah & Sheeko is preparing to open in Renton. It will feature teas, lattes, pastries, and savory items with cultural design elements. The name reflects tea and conversation.

data.status: nearly complete / nearly on the menu
data.short_description: Van Leeuwen ice cream shop is nearing opening at One Loudoun shopping center. Construction has ramped up with official signage now up. No exact opening date is available.

data.location: 210 E 3rd St, Long Beach, CA 90802, Suite C
data.status: planning to open the spot in the first half of June
data.short_description: Pastaphony is expanding to Long Beach this summer with an in-house Grandpa Coffee House. The fast-casual pasta bowl concept will offer build-your-own bowls plus breakfast. It takes over the former Ubuntu Cafe space.

data.status: opening in the near future / by late summer
data.short_description: South Block will open a new location in the Promenade Commons shopping center. The healthy-eating chain offers bowls, smoothies, juices, and toasts. It will be the 27th location.

Little Susie’s Coffee & Pies is expanding to a second South Philly location in the former Pop’s Buns Shop space. The 300 sq ft shop will offer the same in-house sweet and savory pies. It will be the fifth location overall.

Dairi-O is planning a new location in Sanford with double drive-thru and dine-in. The fast-food concept serves burgers, hot dogs, and frozen treats. It will be similar to the recent Harrisburg restaurant.

Cook Out is expanding with a new Charlotte location. The drive-thru concept offers burgers, barbecue, hot dogs, chicken, and 40+ milkshake flavors. The company also acquired properties in Thomasville for potential development.
Entrepreneur Andrew Schuman signed a seven-unit deal for Smalls Sliders in South Denver. The “Cans” concept features bright orange shipping-container restaurants serving sliders and waffle fries.

data.location: 11625 Bandera Rd, San Antonio, TX 78250, Suite 105
data.status: slated to begin construction on June 1, 2026
data.short_description: Another Broken Egg Cafe is planned for Bandera Pointe with interior improvements. The $550,000 renovation project is for a 3,300 sq ft breakfast/brunch restaurant.

data.status: expected to open ... by early June 2026
data.short_description: Joe’s Pizza is opening its second Boston-area location in the Fenway. The NYC staple will offer classic slices and pies with a year-round patio. Hours will run late.

data.store_name: Wine, Darling! (with Footie On First activation)
data.event_date: June (Footie On First), soft launch August, grand opening February 2027
data.status: will roll out in phases beginning this June
data.short_description: Wine, Darling! wine bar concept is preparing to open in Pioneer Square inside the historic Crown Hotel Building. It begins with a World Cup activation in June followed by core concept in August. The joyful nightlife-forward venue includes live entertainment.

data.status: slated to be open (hiring staff, opening date not announced)
data.short_description: Dessert cafe Crepe Haven is planned for a high-profile Baton Rouge plaza. It will offer sweet crepes, dessert waffles, mini pancakes, lattes, and milkshakes.

data.status: hoping to introduce the business sometime in the fall
data.short_description: Trompeau Bakery is opening a third location in Cherry Creek. The French bakery will serve breads, sandwiches, salads, sweets, and ice cream.

Chamblee Tap and Market purchased a three-story building in Kennesaw. The food-and-beverage destination includes a taproom and South End Smokehouse. Further concept details for the new space remain unknown.
N/A

data.location: 4120 Napier St, San Diego, CA 92110, Suite A & B
data.short_description: Nutmeg Bakery and Cafe is planning a new permanent location at 4120 Napier Street. The gluten-free bakery and lower-sugar desserts spot will span approximately 2,340 square feet. This will be the third location for the brand.

data.status: will open at 1408 S. Water St.
data.short_description: A new HTeaO location is heading to Burnet. The 2,866-square-foot spot will undergo renovations from July until October. Franchisee Marcus Dawes is behind the forthcoming location.

data.location: North San Diego (specific addresses not given)
data.status: has signed an agreement to open two units
data.short_description: 16 Handles is expanding to California with two units planned for North San Diego. The frozen yogurt, ice cream, and smoothies brand has eight units planned across the state. No exact timeline is provided.

El Palacio de los Jugos is opening a location in North Miami. The juice stand and restaurant filed permit applications for 12500 Biscayne Boulevard. The brand serves fresh juices, batidos, and a full menu of hot and cold items.

Sake Bar Gaga will debut on June 5 at 634 14th Street in Downtown San Diego. The 10-seat space focuses on a curated selection of more than 20 sakes with small plates. It transforms the existing Sushi Gaga location.
N/A

data.location: 617 S Spring St, Los Angeles, CA
data.short_description: Floretin Rooftop Bar is located in the 20th Century Building in Downtown Los Angeles. It offers Mediterranean small bites, pizzas, salads, and signature cocktails with views. The menu includes items like Spicy Lamb Sausage, Broccoli & Ricotta, and Carrot Margarita.

data.status: will open at 8016 Frankford Ave. / Grand Opening Date dropping soon
data.short_description: La Catrachita is expanding to Northeast Philly with a halal twist. The new shop in the former Wokworks space will serve birria tacos, quesadillas, burritos, and more. It will operate with extended hours on weekends.

data.status: will close at the end of this month
data.short_description: Portland’s Swiss-inspired restaurant Alpenrausch is closing. The restaurant, which opened in late 2023, announced May 30, 2026 as its last working day. It was known for cheese-focused dishes like fondue and raclette.

data.event_date: May 16 (members only), soft opening by end of spring
data.status: will be open to members only starting May 16 / hoping to carry out a soft opening by the end of spring
data.short_description: The Cafe at MOTO is under construction as a creative studio and coffee spot in Ferndale. It will serve fresh roasts, grab-and-go charcuterie, and European-style sandwiches. The cafe is for artists and innovators.

data.status: opening hopefully in June or July
data.short_description: Barakah Beans plans its first brick-and-mortar cafe in Kissimmee. The former coffee cart will serve coffee plus traditional Middle Eastern drinks in a homey space. It was launched after a layoff in 2025.

data.location: 628 Atlantic Blvd, Neptune Beach, FL 32266, Suite 3
data.short_description: Tropical Smoothie Cafe is planned for Neptune Beach by Dyne Hospitality Group. The location is listed as coming soon and will feature smoothies, snack rolls, and Tropiboba Bowls.

data.location: 126 San Jose Blvd, Fruit Cove, FL 32259
data.short_description: Al’s Yum Yum cafe is opening in Fruit Cove serving hand-scooped ice cream, Italian ice, gelato, and coffee. The shop has begun hiring and aims for a welcoming neighborhood feel.
Better Blend will open its first Tampa Bay location in Brandon on June 6. The high-protein, low-sugar smoothies and bowls brand is debuting with three planned locations in the area.

data.status: coming to 1701 W Grand Avenue in early fall
data.short_description: Mini City Play Cafe is under construction for West Town. The play space for ages 0-6 will include a full cafe with Magnifico Coffee and host events. It opens sometime in August.

data.location: 5400 Marina Dr, Holmes Beach, FL 34217, Unit A
data.short_description: Coco Coastal Coffee is planned for Holmes Beach. Plan review documents were submitted for the restaurant at 5400 Marina Drive. No menu or opening date details are available yet.

data.location: 8670 W Sunset Rd, Las Vegas, NV 89148
data.status: introducing a brunch menu this Mother’s Day on May 10 / will be served every Sunday
data.short_description: Butcher & Thief is debuting a new brunch menu on Mother’s Day. Brunch will then be served every Sunday from 11 a.m. to 3 p.m. with egg staples, sweets, and steakhouse items.

data.status: scheduled an exclusive preview from May 8 to May 14 / Grand Opening celebration slated for May 15
data.short_description: Sushi by Bou is coming to the Financial District inside the FIDI Hotel. The 14-seat omakase counter location has a preview May 8-14 and grand opening May 15. It features lounge seating and Japanese spirits.

data.location: 710 Old Hickory Blvd Suite 305, Brentwood, TN 37027
data.short_description: HoneyFire Barbeque Co. is opening its largest Tennessee location in Brentwood. The third Nashville-area restaurant at The Shops at Seven Springs has a ribbon-cutting on May 7. It seats up to 200 with expanded bourbon bar.

non_working.reason: no new business opening or closure (event recap only)
no new business opening or closure (event recap only)
